About.title: ABOUT
About.p1: Colombia-based electronic music producer, crafting minimal and powerful sounds for international audiences.
About.p2: My approach combines deep textures with precise rhythms, seeking a balance between sonic experimentation and dancefloor functionality.

Experience.title: BACKGROUND
Experience.text: Over 8 years of experience in the electronic scene, with performances at clubs and festivals in Colombia, Mexico, Spain, and Germany. Residencies at renowned clubs in Bogotá and Medellín.

Contact.title: CONTACT
